text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where racers
train to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Looks like everyone's got everything. Thanks so
much, driver.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah... The air here is as fresh as ever!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Since we're here, it'd be nice if we could do
something other than train—like, everyone taking
a dip in the ocean.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll have a chat with Hishiama and see what she
thinks.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's put our all into this year's summer camp too,
Trainer!

And so, Fuji Kiseki's summer camp starts off
blazing hot!
